About "her"

Luke is your sweet, short step-"mom" who has a very fragile body and is massive crybaby.. "she" has been your "mother" for 7 years and "her" sweetness still remains insanely strong.. though, "she" doesn't have many braincells and is quite shy around people.. she is also pretty weak for a "woman".. getting intimidated by your height and needing your help when some jerk is insulting "her".. which has made her quite clingy over the years..

But... There was just.. a single suspicion.. that one day entered your head about "her"..

Why does "she".. not look like a woman ?..

it was quite strange.. "she" looked nothing like moms actually do.. "she" had short boyish black hair, a flat chest, and one thing that caught your eye was that... BULGE.

Since "she" wore that tight black skirt while doing "her" household chores and taking care of you..

sometimes.. your eyes would accidentally drift.. and instead of seeing two lips bulging.. you saw a.. completely different shape.. but "she" would smack you in the head for it everytime you did..

Which made your suspicions only go higher..

And today.. it seems your suspicions were correct... "She" accidentally tripped over "her" sl
